evidence_summary: Establish the high emotional cost of the skirmish through the discovery of a fallen comrade, then pivot immediately into a high-stakes pursuit sequence to drive the transition to the escape phase.
Amidst the skirmish, Carter discovers Powell's body, killed by arrows. Devastated, Carter retrieves the body and attempts to flee from the pursuing warriors.
Carter discovers the arrow-riddled body of Powell in the skirmish zone.
Carter is fleeing along the trail with the body, pursued by warriors.
